metadata.description: Lightweight 2-step shopping search pipeline. Calls shopping_search (16 Turkish e-commerce sites + 4 community sources in parallel), then formats and delivers results. Designed to complete in under 60 seconds. Escalates to the full shopping workflow if zero products are returned.

phases.name: Execute Search
phases.goal: Call shopping_search and capture structured results.

phases.name: Format & Deliver
phases.goal: Turn raw search results into a user-facing response.

steps.name: execute_product_search
steps.title: Execute Product Search
steps.instruction: Call the shopping_search tool with the user's query from user_query artifact. The tool automatically searches 16 Turkish e-commerce sites (Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Amazon TR, etc.) and 4 community sources (Technopat, Şikayetvar, DonanımHaber, Ekşi Sözlük) in parallel, returning structured products with prices, ratings, and community opinions. Do NOT fabricate any product names, prices, or availability data — only report what the tool returns. If the tool returns at least one product with a price, capture the full tool output in search_results. If the tool returns zero products, set escalation_needed=true in search_results with reason='no_products_found'.
steps.done_when: shopping_search has been called and its output is captured in search_results, OR escalation_needed is set to true.

steps.name: format_and_deliver
steps.title: Format & Deliver Response
steps.instruction: Read the search_results artifact. If search_results has a formatted_text field, use it as the basis for the response. Enhance with: a brief one-sentence intro referencing the user's query, a highlight of the best-value option (lowest price for adequate specs, or highest-rated), and any notable warnings (e.g. suspiciously low prices, mixed reviews). Keep the response concise and scannable — bullet points for products, bold for prices. If search_results has escalation_needed=true, respond with a short message such as 'Derin arama başlatılıyorum...' ('Let me do a deeper search...') and set escalation=true in shopping_response.
steps.done_when: shopping_response contains a user-facing answer with real prices and source names, or escalation=true is set.
